title: coreopsis pubescens
intro: Coreopsis pubescens, also known as hairy coreopsis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Great Plains region of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of hairy coreopsis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of coreopsis pubescens typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
